subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending all comprehension and knowledge, befitteth that exalted Being Who, in the absence of pen and ink [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ادراک و عرفان حضرت موجودی را لایق و سزاست که در فراق قلم و مداد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
